subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! How great is this Dispensation! How bright the effulgence of this Age, the Age of the All-Glorious Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی کور عظیم است و اشراق شدید و عصر خداوند مجید امکان در حرکت است
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
